categories.name: over_exploration
categories.evidence: tool_calls_total=247, corpus mean=45 (sigma=30). 247 > 105 (mean+2*sigma). Agent read 89 distinct files and ran 31 searches but made only 2 edits. Wall clock time: 58 minutes (near timeout).

annotations.notes: Exemplar: agent explored the repository extensively without forming a coherent strategy.
